title: cyperus digitatus
intro: Cyperus digitatus, also known as Nutgrass or Purple Papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus digitatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support kidney function. Herbal preparations of Cyperus digitatus may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
